description_short: Ergonomic support for long drives and longer days. With anti-skid base, and handy side pocket, this neck cushion keeps your neck & shoulders supported.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Unzip cover, machine wash on gentle cycle.

proprietary_tech.name: Adjustable Straps
proprietary_tech.description: Attaches to headrest of any car/office chair.

faq_specs.question: Does this car neck pillow fit all vehicles?
faq_specs.answer: Yes. The adjustable straps fit compact cars, SUVs, and larger vehicles with ease.

faq_specs.question: Is this neck support pillow for car drivers only?
faq_specs.answer: No. Passengers benefit just as much from proper cervical support on long journeys.
